# cogNNitive

> Central hub for the iNNv0 FORMAT ecosystem. Open, edit, and validate FORMAT models with the unified format-editor.

# Generator: https://skills.innv0.com/innv0-web-design-guide

Pages:
- [Home](https://innv0.github.io/cogNNitive/index.md): cogNNitive landing page
- [About](https://innv0.github.io/cogNNitive/about.md): Architecture, apps, and specs
- [format-editor](https://innv0.github.io/cogNNitive/documentation/format-editor): Unified workspace editor docs
